_notes: Maps skill category labels to eBay category IDs and Inventory API condition enums. condition values must be eBay Inventory API ConditionEnum strings (not numeric IDs from Trading API). Full enum list: NEW, LIKE_NEW, NEW_OTHER, USED_EXCELLENT, USED_VERY_GOOD, USED_GOOD, USED_ACCEPTABLE, FOR_PARTS_OR_NOT_WORKING.

Comics > Graphic Novels & TPBs._note: eBay uses same category for singles and TPBs; update if a better sub-category is found

Consumer Electronics._note: Use for vehicle accessories listed via Inventory API — eBay Motors subcategories (9886 etc) require fitment table data via API and will reject without it. Manually recategorize in Seller Hub after listing if a Motors category is preferred.

Trading Cards > Baseball Card Lots._note: Sports Trading Card Lots (261329). Use for multi-card lots. Conditions: New (1000), Used (3000). All raw lots use USED_EXCELLENT. No conditionDescriptors needed. Manufacturer aspect must be single value — use 'Multiple' for mixed-brand lots. To find category IDs: look at any live eBay listing URL in that category.
